name: theme-zinc
visual_summary: Theme Zinc is a customizable theme component that provides a stylish and modern look for web applications. It can be used when you want to apply a consistent design across your application. This theme can be further customized to fit your brand's identity.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready theme component with the following characteristics:

Name: theme-zinc
Description: Theme Zinc is a customizable theme component that provides a stylish and modern look for web applications. It can be used when you want to apply a consistent design across your application. This theme can be further customized to fit your brand's identity.
Style: material, zinc, dark, light
Interactions: 
Tags: stylish, modern, customizable, responsive

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
